title: Advanced Water Bottle
description: Stop carrying stacks of water | This craftable, reusable bottle fully restores thirst (0–20) and can be refilled anytime. Requires the Thirst Bar mod.
body:
# 💧 Advanced Water Bottle

> A reusable, craftable water bottle that actually keeps you hydrated underground.

The vanilla glass bottle restores **3 thirst out of 20**. That's it. 
When you're deep in a cave or mid-dungeon with the Thirst Bar mod 
installed, it's practically useless. The Advanced Water Bottle fixes 
that — one drink fully maxes your thirst bar, and you can refill it 
at any water source.

---

## ✨ Features

| Feature | Details |
|---|---|
| Drink Charges | 3 per fill cycle |
| Thirst Restored | 20 (max) per drink |
| Durability | 250 max — costs 5 per fill |
| Texture States | 4 dynamic pixel art stages |
| Crafting | Glass bottle + 8 iron ingots |

---

## 🎨 Texture States

The bottle automatically swaps textures based on current charges so 
you always know how much water you have at a glance.

- **Full** — 3 charges remaining
- **Half** — 2 charges remaining  
- **Quarter** — 1 charge remaining
- **Empty** — 0 charges remaining

---

## 🔨 Crafting Recipe

> 8 Iron Ingots Surrounding 1 Glass Bottle

The bottle is crafted **empty** — find a water source and right click 
to fill it up. Takes **3 fills** to reach full capacity.

---

## 🚰 How To Use

1. **Craft** the Advanced Water Bottle at a crafting table
2. **Fill** it by right clicking any water source block — 1 charge per 
   click, 3 clicks to fill fully
3. **Drink** by holding right click — plays vanilla potion animation 
   and sound
4. **Refill** when empty and repeat — bottle breaks permanently at 0 
   durability

---

## ⚠️ Requirements

- [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Thirst Bar](https://modrinth.com/datapack/thirst-bar) — the 
  `thirstbar` scoreboard objective must exist in your world

---

## 🖥️ Server Compatible

Yes — all players must have the mod installed client side. The server 
must be running Fabric with Fabric API and have the Thirst Bar mod loaded.

---

> Textures Designed By: Calvin

> Mod Coded By: player.games AI
